prompt: Create a minimal React frontend with a form to submit data and a list to display results. Use plain CSS for styling. Single page app with no routing needed.
Create a minimal Python FastAPI backend with a POST /items endpoint to accept JSON data and a GET /items endpoint to return all items. Use an in-memory store.
Add SQLite database support to the FastAPI backend. Create a simple items table and replace the in-memory store with SQLite queries using sqlite3.
Review the codebase for bugs and inconsistencies. Check the frontend API calls match the backend endpoints, fix CORS issues, and ensure the database schema matches the Pydantic models.
